summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HH Jaba Staff Portal - mobile-first internal ordering system for 5DM employees. Backend API testing achieved 94.4% success rate (17/18 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed all major user flows working correctly including authentication, product selection, ordering, and payment processing.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 400 when phone number already registered
minor_bugs.impact: Expected validation behavior - not a bug

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Google sign-in button
Products API returns 5 flavors at KES 500 each
Dashboard loads with products for authenticated user
Product quantity selection and ordering flow
Admin API endpoints (pending orders, stock, reconciliation, defaulters, users, invoices)
M-Pesa transaction code input accepts values
